title: An Act relative to the Dracut Water Supply District

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Garry of Dracut and Senator Kennedy, a joint petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Colleen M. Garry for legislation to authorize the Dracut Water Supply District to sell water to certain communities.  Environment and Natural Resources.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on House Rules
Reported, referred to the committee on Joint Rules, reported, rules suspended and referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources
